nmbs_client_create.message0: Init Modbus RTU Client %1 Serial %2 Baud %3
nmbs_client_create.tooltip: Initialize nanoModbus RTU client with serial port and baud rate

nmbs_set_timeout.message0: %1 set timeout read %2 ms byte %3 ms
nmbs_set_timeout.tooltip: Set Modbus read timeout and byte timeout (milliseconds)

nmbs_read_holding_register.tooltip: Read holding register value at address (FC03)

nmbs_read_input_register.tooltip: Read input register value at address (FC04)

nmbs_read_discrete_input.tooltip: Read discrete input value at address (FC02)

nmbs_server_create.message0: Init Modbus RTU Server %1 Serial %2 Baud %3 Address %4
nmbs_server_create.tooltip: Initialize nanoModbus RTU server with serial port, baud rate and device address

nmbs_server_poll.tooltip: Handle incoming Modbus requests, should be called in loop()

nmbs_server_set_coil.tooltip: Set coil value in server data model

nmbs_server_get_coil.tooltip: Get coil value from server data model

nmbs_server_set_register.message0: set server holding register addr %1 value %2
nmbs_server_set_register.tooltip: Set holding register value in server data model

nmbs_server_get_register.tooltip: Get holding register value from server data model

nmbs_server_set_input_register.message0: set server input register addr %1 value %2
nmbs_server_set_input_register.tooltip: Set input register value in server data model (client reads via FC04)
